ul.li: Fully Blocking: CPU thread stalls on every API call.
Zero Overlap: Copy and Compute engines cannot run concurrently.
Resource Waste: GPU SMs sit idle while data moves; Copy engines sit idle while kernel runs.
Performance: Total latency is purely additive ($T_{total} = T_{h2d} + T_{kern} + T_{d2h}$).

div.p: Overlap Achieved: H2D(n+1) overlaps with Kernel(n) and D2H(n-1)
